description: Create exchange-specific job implementations for BitGet, KuCoin, and ByBit (matching Binance patterns)
ralphInstructions: IMPORTANT: (1) Do NOT write tests. (2) RE-READ CLAUDE.md and Laravel best practices BEFORE each story. (3) Check existing Binance implementations as patterns. (4) Use search-docs tool for Laravel features. (5) Extend base classes, override only what's exchange-specific. (6) After completing each story, verify class extends correct base class.

userStories.title: Create Bitget CalculateWapAndModifyProfitOrderJob
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Bitget-specific WAP job so that profit orders are recalculated correctly after DCA fills on Bitget.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses Bitget API to fetch position's breakEvenPrice
Updates reference_price and reference_quantity in complete() method
userStories.notes: Copy Binance implementation. Check app/Services/Bitget/BitgetFutureService.php for API methods. Base class at Jobs/Atomic/Order/CalculateWapAndModifyProfitOrderJob.php

userStories.title: Create Bitget CorrectModifiedOrderJob
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Bitget-specific order correction job so that modified orders are restored to original values on Bitget.
acceptanceCriteria: For algo orders (is_algo=true), uses cancel+recreate flow
userStories.notes: Copy Binance implementation. Bitget uses Plan Order API for stop orders. Check app/Services/Bitget/BitgetFutureService.php

userStories.title: Create Bitget ReplacePositionOrdersJob
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Bitget-specific order replacement job so that cancelled/expired orders are recreated on Bitget.
userStories.notes: Copy Binance implementation. Base class at Jobs/Lifecycles/Position/ReplacePositionOrdersJob.php

userStories.title: Create Bitget DispatchPositionJob
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Bitget-specific position dispatch job so that positions open correctly on Bitget.
userStories.notes: Copy Binance implementation. Base class at Jobs/Lifecycles/Position/DispatchPositionJob.php
